title: Purge the System From the ACB API Screen After a Power Outage
summary: Use the System HMI ACB API screen to purge the system after a power outage during a sort that lasts long enough for systems to lose communication. This sends AGVs with totes to operator stations so totes can be emptied, and packages must then be re-circulated to the sorter lane because bag labels will not be printed.
when_to_use: Use after a power outage in the middle of a sort when the outage is long enough for systems to lose communication.
not_for: Do not use when the source condition of a power outage during a sort with communication loss is not present.
Do not use as a substitute for other recovery steps not provided by the source when the ACB API screen or SYSTEM PURGE action is unavailable.

responsibilities: Navigate to the ACB API screen on the System HMI.
Press SYSTEM PURGE in the System section.
Allow AGVs with totes to go to operator stations.
Re-circulate packages to the sorter lane because labels will not be printed for bags.

safety_notes: Use only the documented HMI recovery action from the source.
The source does not provide additional recovery steps if the ACB API screen or SYSTEM PURGE action is unavailable.
access_or_tools_needed: ACB API screen on the System HMI
SYSTEM PURGE control in the System section
Access to operator stations to empty totes

access_required: Access to operator stations to empty totes
system_preconditions: A power outage occurred in the middle of a sort.
The outage lasted long enough for systems to lose communication.

visual_references.description: System HMI screen reference associated with the ACB API screen and SYSTEM PURGE action used after a power outage.
System API Controls figure showing the System section and System Purge control on the API screen.

steps.title: Navigate to the ACB API screen
steps.purpose: Reach the documented recovery screen used after a power outage with communication loss.
steps.instruction: On the System HMI, navigate to the "ACB API" screen.
steps.expected_result: The ACB API screen is displayed on the System HMI.
steps.healthy_condition: The operator can view the ACB API screen and access the System section.
steps.failure_condition: The ACB API screen cannot be reached or is unavailable.

actions.label: Open ACB API screen
actions.exact_action: Navigate to the "ACB API" screen on the System HMI.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The System HMI ACB API screen referenced for post-power-outage recovery.
The System section of the API screen where system controls, including System Purge, are located.

stop_or_escalate_if: The ACB API screen is unavailable.
The source provides no alternate recovery path if the ACB API screen cannot be accessed.

source_evidence.quote: If there is a power outage in the middle of a sort that is long enough for systems to lose communication, navigate to the "ACB API" screen on the System HMI and press SYSTEM PURGE in the System section.

steps.title: Press SYSTEM PURGE in the System section
steps.purpose: Initiate the documented purge action that sends AGVs with totes to operator stations.
steps.instruction: In the "System" section of the ACB API screen, press "SYSTEM PURGE."
steps.expected_result: The system purge action is initiated from the System section.
steps.healthy_condition: SYSTEM PURGE is available and can be pressed from the System section.
steps.failure_condition: SYSTEM PURGE is unavailable or cannot be executed.

actions.label: Initiate system purge
actions.exact_action: Press "SYSTEM PURGE" in the System section.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The ACB API screen used for the SYSTEM PURGE action after a power outage.
The System Purge control in the System section of the API screen.

stop_or_escalate_if: SYSTEM PURGE is not available on the screen.
The source provides no additional recovery steps if the SYSTEM PURGE action is unavailable.

source_evidence.quote: If there is a power outage in the middle of a sort that is long enough for systems to lose communication, navigate to the "ACB API" screen on the System HMI and press SYSTEM PURGE in the System section.
The system can be started, shut down, and purged from this screen.

steps.title: Allow AGVs with totes to go to operator stations and empty totes
steps.purpose: Complete the documented post-purge handling of totes after communication loss.
steps.instruction: Allow the AGVs with totes to go to operator stations so the totes can be emptied.
steps.expected_result: AGVs with totes arrive at operator stations and the totes are emptied.
steps.healthy_condition: AGVs with totes go to operator stations and totes are emptied.
steps.failure_condition: AGVs do not go to operator stations or totes are not emptied.

actions.label: Observe AGV movement to operator stations
actions.exact_action: Allow the AGVs with totes to go to operator stations.

actions.label: Empty totes at operator stations
actions.exact_action: Empty the totes at the operator stations.

stop_or_escalate_if: AGVs with totes do not go to operator stations.
The source does not provide an escalation path if AGVs do not go to operator stations or totes are not emptied.

source_evidence.quote: All AGVs with totes will go to operator stations and the totes will be emptied.

steps.title: Re-circulate packages to the sorter lane
steps.purpose: Handle packages correctly because bag labels are not printed during this recovery condition.
steps.instruction: Re-circulate the packages to the sorter lane because labels will not be printed for bags.
steps.expected_result: Packages are re-circulated to the sorter lane.
steps.healthy_condition: Packages are re-circulated to the sorter lane after totes are emptied.
steps.failure_condition: Packages are not re-circulated as required after labels are not printed for bags.

actions.label: Re-circulate packages
actions.exact_action: Re-circulate the packages to the sorter lane because labels will not be printed for bags.

stop_or_escalate_if: Packages cannot be re-circulated to the sorter lane.
The source does not provide additional recovery or escalation guidance for this condition.

source_evidence.quote: Labels will not be printed for bags, so the packages will need to be re-circulated to the sorter lane.
Purge sends all totes to the tippers without printing labels.

success_criteria: The ACB API screen is accessed on the System HMI.
SYSTEM PURGE is executed from the System section.
AGVs with totes go to operator stations.
Totes are emptied at operator stations.
Packages are re-circulated to the sorter lane because bag labels are not printed.
healthy_conditions: The ACB API screen is available on the System HMI.
The System section includes the SYSTEM PURGE control.
After purge, AGVs with totes go to operator stations.
Packages are re-circulated to the sorter lane.
failure_conditions: The ACB API screen is unavailable.
The SYSTEM PURGE action is unavailable or cannot be executed.
AGVs with totes do not go to operator stations.
Packages are not re-circulated to the sorter lane.
The source provides no alternate recovery path or escalation path for these failures.
escalation_guidance: If the ACB API screen or SYSTEM PURGE action is unavailable, stop and escalate because the source does not provide additional recovery steps.
If AGVs do not go to operator stations or totes are not emptied, stop and escalate because the source does not provide an escalation path.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: ACB API screen reference associated with the SYSTEM PURGE action after a power outage.
System section of the API screen showing that System Purge is a supported control.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: If there is a power outage in the middle of a sort that is long enough for systems to lose communication, navigate to the "ACB API" screen on the System HMI and press SYSTEM PURGE in the System section. All AGVs with totes will go to operator stations and the totes will be emptied. Labels will not be printed for bags, so the packages will need to be re-circulated to the sorter lane.
Artifact appears on page 212 in section optisweep_operation_and_maintenance_manual_final_1_7_3_25_after_a_power_outage.

missing_details: The source does not provide estimated completion time.
The source does not specify supporting roles.
The source does not provide additional recovery steps if the ACB API screen or SYSTEM PURGE action is unavailable.
The source does not provide an escalation contact or path if AGVs do not go to operator stations or totes are not emptied.
The source does not provide explicit verification indicators on the HMI after SYSTEM PURGE is pressed.
